text_original:
Reduced! Reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your sake, O prince,
How should we be thus exposed to the dew?
text_normalized:
Reduced! Reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your sake, O prince,
How should we be thus exposed to the dew?

text_original:
Reduced! reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your person, O prince,
How should we be here in the mire?
text_normalized:
Reduced! reduced!
Why not return?
If it were not for your person, O prince,
How should we be here in the mire?
